creator: freebsd@linepoint.com
text:
Update of haproxy-devel back to the development branch of the software.

This update fixes a few things:
 - adds usage of port OPTIONS
 - license options defined
 - Correct compilation using gmake
 - Updated rc.d file
 - Correct dependency listings

Major new feature in development is the addition of request throttling per IP address.  Please check out the changelog for a longer listing of things done!

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
